title: Bridge Essay: High ventilation breathwork practices: An overview of their effects, mechanisms,

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Breath/Soul** (Phase 2) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Breath/Soul to mechanistic neuroscience.

**High ventilation breathwork practices: An overview of their effects, mechanisms, and considerations for clinical applications.** — Neurosci Biobehav Rev. PMID: 37923236. DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2023.105453. High Ventilation Breathwork (HVB) refers to practices employing specific volitional manipulation of breathing, with along history of use to relieve various forms of psychological distress. This paper seeks to offer aconsolidative insight into potential clinical application of HVB as atreatment of psychiatric disorders. We thus review the characteristic phenomenological and neurophysiological effects of these practices to inform their mechanism of therapeutic action, safety profiles and future
